name: hermes-whatsapp-web-source
description: WhatsApp Web source-of-truth projection service for Hermes Agent

scripts.check: node --check source-daemon.js backfill-manager.js browser-options.js contact-manager.js daemon-utils.js memory-diagnostics.js normalization.js page-hooks.js status-writer.js store-writer.js && python3 -m py_compile store.py
